title: Dalek Mod: UHD
body:
# Dalek Mod: UHD
This resource pack adds HD TARDISes and sonics back into Dalek Mod.
[Dalek Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod) is required for this to take effect. 

Massive thanks to TheMajorNoob_239 for doing the TARDIS textures and models!

Please report any problems to our discord server
